source_cells.line_source: National Stem Cell Bank of Korea (KSCB)

matrix.name: fibronectin
matrix.notes: for KSCBi005 WT line; CS40iFAD-nxx AD line used GFR-Matrigel (Corning)

base_media.notes: for KSCBi005 WT line; CS40iFAD-nxx AD line used mTeSR Plus (STEMCELL Technologies)

differentiation_timeline.days_1_to_5: daily medium refresh with dorsomorphin 2.5 uM, SB431542 10 uM, ROCK inhibitor 50 uM
differentiation_timeline.day_6: EBs transferred to 60 mm dishes; neuronal differentiation medium (Neurobasal-A + 1x GlutaMAX + 1x B-27 without Vitamin A) + bFGF 20 ng/mL + EGF 20 ng/mL; daily for 10 days then every other day for 9 days
differentiation_timeline.days_25_to_42: neuronal differentiation medium + BDNF 20 ng/mL + NT3 20 ng/mL, every other day
differentiation_timeline.day_43_plus: neuronal differentiation medium only (no growth factors), every other day

evidence.organoid_type: Cortical brain organoids were generated from two human iPSC lines
evidence.source_cells.cell_type: KSCBi005, a human-induced pluripotent stem cell line from the National Stem Cell Bank of Korea (KSCB, Chung-Ju, Republic of Korea)
evidence.source_cells.species: KSCBi005, a human-induced pluripotent stem cell line from the National Stem Cell Bank of Korea
evidence.matrix.fibronectin: KSCBi005 cells were cultured on fibronectin (Corning, Corning, NY, USA)-coated plates using Essential 8 medium (Gibco, Grand Island, NY, USA)
evidence.matrix.GFR_Matrigel_AD_line: CS40iFAD-nxx cells were cultured on GFR-Matrigel (Corning, NY, USA)-coated plates in mTeSR™ Plus medium (STEMCELL Technologies, Cambridge, MA, USA)
evidence.base_media.Essential8: KSCBi005 cells were cultured on fibronectin (Corning, Corning, NY, USA)-coated plates using Essential 8 medium (Gibco, Grand Island, NY, USA)
evidence.base_media.mTeSR_AD_line: CS40iFAD-nxx cells were cultured on GFR-Matrigel (Corning, NY, USA)-coated plates in mTeSR™ Plus medium (STEMCELL Technologies, Cambridge, MA, USA)
evidence.passaging.interval_days: Each cell line was passaged every 4–5 days, depending on the confluency of the cells, using ReLeSR™
evidence.passaging.method: Each cell line was passaged every 4–5 days, depending on the confluency of the cells, using ReLeSR™
evidence.dissociation: iPSCs were dissociated into single cells using Accutase
evidence.seeding.density: The dissociated cells were then counted and seeded into ultralow-attachment 96-well plates (Corning, NY, USA), with 9000 cells in each well
evidence.days_1_5: 2.5 µM dorsomorphin, 10 µM SB431542 and 50 µM ROCK inhibitor. The medium was refreshed daily for 5 days.
evidence.day_6_transfer: On Day 6, the formed EBs were then transferred into 60 mm culture dishes with neuronal differentiation medium consisting of Neurobasal-A, with 1 × GlutaMAX and 1 × B-27 Supplement without Vitamin A, 20 ng/mL bFGF and 20 ng/mL EGF. The medium was replaced daily for the first 10 days and then replaced every other day for the next 9 days.
evidence.days_25_42: neuronal differentiation medium supplemented with 20 ng/mL BDNF and 20 ng/mL NT3 was provided and replaced every other day from Day 25 until Day 42.
evidence.day_43_plus: From Day 43 onward, the neuronal differentiation medium was used without any growth factors and changed every other day.
evidence.total_duration: cultured for up to 8 to 14 weeks for analysis
evidence.STB_MP_treatment: STB-MP was administered to both WT and AD cortical brain organoids for 14 days, beginning at Day 84
evidence.second_cell_line: PSEN1-mutated patient-derived CS40iFAD-nxx (RRID:CVCL_YX94) iPSCs from the Cedars Sinai Medical Center iPSC Core Facility

notes: Primary paper studies nano-structured material (STB-MP, silk-tropoelastin biomaterial microparticles) effects on cortical brain organoids. Two cell lines used: KSCBi005 (WT control, fibronectin + Essential 8) and CS40iFAD-nxx (PSEN1-mutated AD model, GFR-Matrigel + mTeSR Plus). Silver evaluation correctly extracted KSCBi005 as primary annotated line but mis-assigned CS40iFAD-nxx matrix (GFR-Matrigel) to it. Silver also extracted passaging interval as 4 days flat, missing the range qualifier '4-5'. All signaling factor concentrations and 4 assay endpoints were correctly extracted at silver stage. KSCBi005 has no RRID reported in paper.
